title: [BUG] Office Online doesn't support tables generated by addTables
author: ferk6a
body:
## 🐛 Bug Report

Office Online says that the XLSX generated is broken and is unable to fix it. It's impossible to edit the document, only view it.

Lib version: 3.8.0

## Steps To Reproduce

1. Generate a XLSX with a table like so:
```javascript
const Excel = require('exceljs')
const workBook = new Excel.Workbook()
const workSheet = workBook.addWorksheet("1")
workSheet.addTable({
  ref: "A1",
  name: "1",
  columns: [
    { name: "1" },
    { name: "2" }
  ],
  rows: []
})

workBook.xlsx.writeFile("test.xlsx")
```

2. Import it to Office Online
3. Get the following errors:

```
Resource Removed: Part autofilter of /xl/tables/table1.xml (Table)
Resource Removed: Part table of /xl/tables/table1.xml (Table) 
```

## The expected behaviour:

No errors.

## Possible solution (optional, but very helpful):

I've been investigating, but so far, nothing.

comments.author: GeeWee
nwatab
comments.body: I faced the same problem. I hope rows accepts object of array.
